name: COMPASS Pathways plc
business: Compass Pathways is a biotechnology company developing its proprietary COMP360 psilocybin treatment for serious mental health conditions, initially focusing on treatment-resistant depression (TRD) and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD). The company is currently conducting Phase 3 clinical trials for TRD and has received FDA acceptance of an IND for a Phase 2b/3 trial in PTSD.

exposures.sentence: COMP360 is our proprietary psilocybin formulation that includes our pharmaceutical-grade polymorphic crystalline psilocybin, optimized for stability and purity.

the costs of developing, testing and deploying digital technology solutions or paying a third-party to provide such technology solutions to improve the patient experience and therapeutic process via third-party service providers or internally
